question:
Will Macclesfield FC win on 2025-11-01?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 1, 2025
If Macclesfield FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.thefa.com/competitions/thefacup

evidences.title: History | Macclesfield FC Official Website
evidences.content: The Club’s Women’s Team did secure yet another promotion, however, as they continued their progression up the football pyramid. The 2024/25 campaign was a special one as The Silkmen won the Northern Premier League – Premier Division in convincing fashion, brushing off the heartbreak of the previous season’s play-off defeat. Macclesfield secured their spot in the National League North courtesy of a comeback victory over Bamber Bridge on 22nd March, and with it became the first side in the top seven tiers to secure promotion. The Silkmen would ultimately go on to win the league by a staggering 26 points, finishing the season with 12 consecutive victories. [...] On 31 July 2021 Macclesfield FC played their first competitive match – a 1–0 home win against Burscough in the NWCFL Premier Division which was witnessed by 2,018 people. Leon Arnasalam wrote his name into the history books that day, as he became Macclesfield FC’s first-ever goal scorer. The Club’s first away match was on 3 August 2021. In what proved to be an encapsulating affair, four Tom Clare goals saw The Silkmen claim a share of the spoils in a 4 – 4 draw at Winsford United. On 7 August 2021 Macclesfield FC played the...

evidences.title: Get to know our FA Cup opponents: Macclesfield FC
evidences.content: ### Record-breaking 2024/25 season The 2024/25 campaign proved to be one of the most dominant in Northern Premier League history. Macclesfield secured promotion to the National League North with weeks to spare, finishing 26 points clear of their nearest rivals, winning 12 consecutive matches and amassing a league-record 109 points. It marked a remarkable first season in management for Savage, with numerous club records shattered along the way. ### A new era under John Rooney Last summer, ahead of the 2025/26 season, Savage departed to take up the manager’s role at National League side Forest Green Rovers. [...] ### Rapid climb through the leagues Progress came quickly. In March 2022, Macclesfield became the first club within the highest nine tiers of the English pyramid to secure promotion, clinching the NWCFL Premier Division title with a convincing 4-0 victory against Ashton Athletic. What followed was an extraordinary rise. The Silkmen claimed the Northern Premier League Division One West title in 2022/23 and, the following season, reached the FA Trophy semi-final – the only side outside the National League to achieve the feat that year. They completed a remarkable hat-trick...

DURATION OF MATCHES (a) The duration of each match shall be 90 minutes, except in special cases, provided for in these Competition Rules, where an extra 30 minutes shall be played. The Referee shall allow for time wasted or lost through accident or other cause. The Referee is the sole judge of allowance of time whether lost through accident or other cause and his decision on this matter is not subject to appeal. (b) The half-time interval shall be 15 minutes for all ties in the Competition. (c) Both teams shall enter the field of play together five minutes prior to the kick-off time, along with the Match Officials. (d) In all rounds of the Competition, when a match is drawn at full time, the winner shall [...] when a match is drawn at full time, the winner shall be determined by the taking of kicks from the penalty mark in accordance with the procedure adopted by the International Football Association Board. evidences.title: [PDF] Match Abandonments - know the rules - The FA
evidences.content: Failure to comply with this Rule will result in a fine in accordance with the Fines Tariff. Rule 20 (E) (IV) The Management Committee shall review all Competition Matches abandoned in cases where it is consequent upon the conduct of either or both Teams. Where it is to the advantage of the Competition and does no injustice to either Club, the Management Committee shall order the score at the time of the abandonment to stand. In all cases where the Management Committee are satisfied that a Match was abandoned owing to the conduct of one Team or its Club member(s) they shall award the points for the Match to the opponent. In cases where a Match has been abandoned owing to the conduct of both Teams or their Club member(s), the Management Committee shall rule that neither Team will be awarded [...] Committee shall rule that neither Team will be awarded any points for that Match and it shall not be replayed. No fine(s) can be applied by the Management Committee for an abandoned Match. [...] to order the Match to be played on or before a given date. evidences.content: 2025/26 FA Cup fixtures & predictions: The semi-finals #### 2025/26 FA Cup fixtures & predictions: The semi-finals [...] While Oliver Glasner will no doubt rotate his team and give some players the chance to shine, a host of injuries and absences mean a handful of regular players will still be involved, and their Premier League class should show against their non-league hosts - no matter how determined the Macclesfield team might be. Defending their FA Cup crown will give Palace an extra ounce of motivation going into a game where complacency will be their biggest enemy, but with all things considered, we're expecting a comfortable day for the visitors. Widely considered one of the best players of his generation and one of the greatest British players of all time,( Rooney is Manchester United's all-time leading goalscorer with 253 goals and was the record goalscorer for the England national team from 2015 to 2023. evidences.content: Law 10 explains when a goal is scored: the whole of the ball must pass over the goal line between the goalposts and under the crossbar, provided no offence has been committed by the scoring team. It also outlines other basic determinations around goals and referee signalling.
evidences.query: FA Cup rules: match result determination within 90 minutes plus stoppage, postponement/abandonment/cancellation and replay policies site:thefa.com 2025 rulebook

evidences.title: Law 7 - The Duration of the Match (The FA)
evidences.content: Law 7 summarizes match duration rules: a match lasts two equal halves of 45 minutes (which may only be reduced if agreed before kick-off and in line with competition rules). Players are entitled to a half-time interval not exceeding 15 minutes; short drinks breaks should be limited.
evidences.query: FA Cup rules: match result determination within 90 minutes plus stoppage, postponement/abandonment/cancellation and replay policies site:thefa.com 2025 rulebook

evidences.title: Macclesfield: club history and recent developments
evidences.content: Notes the club’s recent history: Macclesfield were expelled from the National League five years earlier with significant debts; the club was later purchased by local businessman Robert Smethurst and re-entered at the ninth tier in 2021-22, achieving multiple promotions in subsequent seasons.

evidences.title: Macclesfield FC: background and squad notes
evidences.content: Background on Macclesfield FC: John Rooney began his playing career at the club and rejoined the team in 2023; he moved into management in July 2025. The club has made notable signings (for example, McLeod from Wolves academy) and striker Danny Elliott has been a leading goalscorer this season.
